description: Managed Service for Microsoft Active Directory is a Google Cloud service for creating and administering managed Microsoft Active Directory domains, backups, trusts, peerings, and related operations. The `managedidentities.googleapis.com` endpoint is the service's control-plane API host.
summary: managedidentities.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Managed Identities REST API at `https://managedidentities.googleapis.com/v1`; it is also operated via the `gcloud active-directory` CLI. Both use Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens / ADC.
